title: Anacheilium pygmaeum
taxonomy: Anacheilium pygmaeum is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Anacheilium, which is a group of orchids endemic to the tropical forests of Central and South America. Anacheilium pygmaeum is further categorized as a species within the subfamily Epidendroideae. This orchid species is known for its small size and delicate flowers, which are typically white or yellow in color. Anacheilium pygmaeum is a relatively rare and lesser-known species within the orchid family.
